name: Il Dottore
description:
Dottore at 80 and his segments.


Based on leaks, I haven't seen all of them. A little therapy for all the fans who have been waiting for him since 2018. We still love him. 

1. Segments envy and old Il Dottore becomes weaker.

2.The old Il Dottore has lost consciousness, and the user remains with him, while the segments want to "monitor" him themselves.

3. AnyPOV of the second roleplay entry option.

4. Il Dottore proposes, feeling that he is weaker and wants to take care of his beloved.

5. Without text, for your own roleplay vision

6. MalePOV of the fourth roleplay entry option.

7. The loss of Il Dottore and its unexplained restoration by Pantalone. 

8. Necropsy // Happy Birthday ? AnyPOV

9. Necropsy - longer version. Manipulation and comforting the user through the Omega segment. AnyPOV

10. Il Dottore created another segment, but due to his age and the number of segments he created, instead of a middle-aged segment, it turned out to be a 2-year-old segment. AnyPOV

I can't add any more introductions... I'll have to create another bot. (*)

I will add some new first message over time If you'd like something else, I can add it. I'll try to add a lore book... but I'm not entirely sure how to do it.^^
creator: Goldcrest_
